name: cognee-openclaw-skills
description: Self-improving agent skills: ingest SKILL.md files, execute against tasks, and automatically diagnose and fix failing skills over time.

apiKey.description: Cognee API key (or set COGNEE_API_KEY env var)

username.description: Cognee username for login (or set COGNEE_USERNAME env var)

password.description: Cognee password for login (or set COGNEE_PASSWORD env var)

skillsFolder.description: Workspace-relative path to the folder containing SKILL.md skill definitions

datasetName.description: Cognee dataset name for skill storage

autoObserve.description: Record agent run outcomes to feed the self-improvement loop

autoAmendify.description: Automatically inspect and fix failing skills after runs

amendifyMinRuns.description: Minimum failed runs before auto-amendify triggers

amendifyScoreThreshold.description: Runs scoring below this count as failures
